subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O my God, Lord of sovereignty and the Kingdom! I beseech Thee by the manifestations of Thy power in the realm of might [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک اللهم یا اله الملک و الملکوت اسئلک بظهورات قدرتک فی عالم الجبروت
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @praise and encouragement
